description: This is a pack of 6 white ;Pink ;Cream ;Blue cotton 'pop over the head' bibs. They are made in our own factory in the UK, from 100% pure soft double-layered cotton, making the bib more absorbent and kind to baby's skin. There is no irritating plastic backing, and the neckhole is made from a quality stretch rib which will keep it's shape after use. They are a nice snug fit, making it more difficult for baby to wiggle out of and ensuring less mess! They are so soft and comfortable that baby will be happy to concentrate on feeding rather than trying to remove the bib, and are also ideal to wear during playtime. They are available in one size, measuring approximately 33 x 19 inches from the neck hole to the bottom, to fit babies of all ages.
